## Build And Launch

- prefer durable runtime instrumentation over one-off editor guesses when debugging live PIE behavior
- prefer first-class in-repo automation surfaces over permanent dependence on ad hoc Unreal Python scripts
- treat editor Python as a bridge or support lane, not as the final runtime automation substrate for this sandbox

## Environment Bootstrap

## Environment Bootstrap

### Bootstrap 1: Build The Editor Target

```powershell

```powershell
& 'C:\Agent\UnrealEngine\Engine\Build\BatchFiles\Build.bat' ThirdPersonEditor Win64 Development 'C:\Agent\ThirdPerson\ThirdPerson.uproject' -WaitMutex -NoHotReloadFromIDE
```

```

Success means the `ThirdPersonEditor` target compiles without code errors.

### Bootstrap 2: Launch The Project

```powershell
& 'C:\Agent\UnrealEngine\Engine\Binaries\Win64\UnrealEditor.exe' 'C:\Agent\ThirdPerson\ThirdPerson.uproject'
```

```

Success means the editor opens to the default map.
